name: Past Tense
examples: I went to school.
She ate breakfast.
They played football.
common_errors: Using present form for past events

name: Present Continuous
examples: I am studying English.
She is working now.
They are playing games.

name: Because Clause
examples: I study hard because I want good grades.
She is tired because she worked late.
They are happy because they won the game.

name: Present Perfect
examples: I have finished my homework.
She has lived here for five years.
They have already eaten.

name: Conditional
examples: If it rains, I will stay home.
If I were rich, I would travel the world.
If you study hard, you will pass.

name: Future Tense
examples: I will go to school tomorrow.
She will eat breakfast soon.
They will play football next week.
common_errors: Using present tense for future events

name: Present Perfect Continuous
examples: I have been studying for two hours.
She has been working all day.
They have been playing since morning.

name: Passive Voice
examples: The book was written by her.
The cake was eaten by the children.
The lesson is being taught by the teacher.
common_errors: Using active form instead of passive

name: Relative Clause
examples: The man who lives here is kind.
The book that I read is interesting.
The place where she works is far.

name: Reported Speech
examples: She said that she was happy.
He told me that he would come.
They asked whether I knew the answer.
